---
title: "Hypergraph based software representation, mining and visualization"
author:
  - name: Peter Kapec
  - name: Peter Drahoš
date: "2009-11-01"
categories: [conference paper]
citation:
  type: paper-conference
  container-title: "INFORMATICS 2009: Tenth International Conference on Informatics, Herľany, Slovakia"
  isbn: "978-80-8086-126-1"
  page: "253-258"
---
